pageDescription: Create downloadable full backups, including the database (users, TOTP secrets) along with page content, assets, and branding. This is separate from Git Content Backup, which covers page content only.
sectionDescription: Automatically creates a full backup on the configured interval. Only the most recent backups are kept — configure the schedule and retention count in your server environment settings.
hintDisabled: Full backup is not enabled. To enable it, set --snapshot (or LEAFWIKI_SNAPSHOT=true) in your server environment settings.
manualSectionDescription: Trigger an immediate full backup without waiting for the next scheduled run.
listSectionDescription: Download a backup to restore it manually: stop the server, extract the ZIP over your data directory, then restart. See the README for the full restore procedure.
deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the backup file. This cannot be undone.
